description.value: Aura moderate abjuration; CL 6th; Slot body; Price 22,000 gp; Weight 1 lb. DESCRIPTION This slimming garment is fastened with laces, buckles, and buttons and reinforced with ribs of leather or bone. A corset of dire witchcraft grants a +4 armor bonus to AC. If the wearer is a witch, each day when she communes with her familiar to prepare spells, she may enhance one hex she knows, increasing its caster level by +2 for 24 hours. This enhancement ends if the corset is removed or if she uses it to enhance a different hex. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Feats Craft Wondrous Item, mage armor; Special creator must be a witch; Cost 11,000 gp.
